case_title: IN RE: DONALD CARMIGNANI ET AL
cause_of_action: OTHER CIVIL PETITIONS (for release of property from liens)

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FOR PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIENS (TRANSACTION ID # 63563914) FILED BY PETITIONER CARMIGNANI, DONALD AN INDIVIDUAL 212-214 CALIFORNIA STREET, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
ORDER RELEASING PROPERTY FROM LIENS [CAL.CIVIL CODE SECTION 8490]
MINI MINUTES FOR AUG-26-2019 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 501

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONER DONALD CARMIGNANI, 212-214 CALIFORNIA STREET, LLC NOTICE OF HEARING ON PETITION FOR RELEASE OF PROPERTY FROM LIENS IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. PROPERTY IS RELEASED FROM MECHANIC'S LIENS RECORDED ON OCTOBER 25, 2016 AND NOVEMBER 18, 2016 BY SALAS AN MODIRIAN RESPECTIVELY. ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS ARE AWARDED AS REQUESTS AND SHALL BE PAID AS FOLLOWS: $1,117.50 BY SALAS AND $1,117.50 BY MODIRIAN. PETITIONER TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CC 8490. ORDER FOR THE SAME SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Liens
Off Calendar Aug-26-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: -Appearances:
Nick Colla, Esq. of Colla & Ray, 415-579-1412, appearing for Donald Carmignani, Plaintiff and moving party.

Kamran Modirian, Defendant in Properia Persona., 650-274-6058,

Hearing held. The Court stated that there was no opposition filed for this motion.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER DONALD CARMIGNANI, 212-214 CALIFORNIA STREET, LLC Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Liens is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Property is released from Mechanic's Liens recorded on October 25, 2016 and November 18, 2016 by Salas an Modirian respectively. Attorney's fees and costs are awarded as requests and shall be paid as follows: $1,117.50 by Salas and $1,117.50 by Modirian. Petitioner to prepare order in compliance with CC 8490. Order for the same signed in open court. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Liens
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Continued To Aug-26-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PETITIONER DONALD CARMIGNANI, 212-214 CALIFORNIA STREET, LLC Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Liens
is continued to August 26, 2019 on Court's own motion. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
